title: lobelia goetzei
intro: Lobelia goetzei, also known as East African lobelia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of lobelia goetzei include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating anxiety and insomnia. Lobelia goetzei can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory and nervous system disorders.
